daily.today_energy: Your intuition is running hot today, Pisces. Trust those gut feelings that pop up unexpectedly—they're basically your soul's way of texting you. Something's shifting in your favor, even if you can't quite see it yet.
daily.love: Whether you're coupled up or flying solo, there's a tenderness in the air around you. If you're with someone, a simple conversation could deepen things. Single? Someone's definitely noticing your energy. Just be authentically you.
daily.career: Your creative wavelength is strong right now. This is your moment to pitch that idea or take a different approach to what's been feeling stale. Your perspective is actually valuable—stop second-guessing yourself.
daily.health: Your body's asking for gentle movement today—maybe a walk, some stretching, or whatever feels healing. Mental health check-in: journaling or talking to someone you trust could feel really grounding right now.

weekly.overview: Your intuition is basically leveling up this week. Mercury's vibe is pushing you to trust those gut feelings that usually hit different. Expect clarity in places where you've been sitting with confusion.
weekly.love: Whether you're coupled up or manifesting, this week asks you to be vulnerable in a way that actually feels safe. Someone's about to show up for you—or you'll realize someone already has been.
weekly.career: Your creative energy is unmatched right now. This is the moment to pitch that idea or take on a project that's been living rent-free in your head. Your unique perspective is literally what people need.
weekly.health: Your body's asking for gentleness this week. Rest isn't laziness—it's actually the move. Lean into activities that feel nourishing rather than punishing. Flow over force.
